report_error: Something went wrong — please try again.
admin_confirm_suspend_body: This will prevent {{name}} from logging in. You can remove the suspension at any time from the Suspended tab.
admin_confirm_reset_body: This will remove {{name}}'s custom avatar, display name, and bio, reverting them to their Discord defaults.
admin_confirm_delete_journey_log_body: This will permanently clear the journey log text. The journey record itself will remain. This cannot be undone.
admin_confirm_delete_comment_body: This will permanently delete this comment. This cannot be undone.
account_suspended_body: Your account has been suspended. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact us at contact@yurnik.example.
login_tagline: An open social network for gaming journeys
lore_tagline: An open social network for gaming journeys
lore_feature_realm_body: Your home feed. Confirmed journeys from the players you follow, in reverse chronological order, as they happen.
lore_feature_log_body: Write a note when you confirm a journey — what happened, how it felt, what's next. Edit it any time.
lore_feature_players_body: Browse recent journeys by game. Find out who's playing what and follow players whose journeys you want in your Realm.
lore_feature_agent_body: Install the optional tray agent and your journeys are detected automatically. Just play, then confirm.
lore_feature_horizon_body: Keep a public list of games you intend to play next. Add them from a game page or your Horizon, and share what's coming up.
lore_open_title: Built for players, owned by players
lore_open_point_4_sub: Built in the open, free forever
lore_bottom_title: Ready to start your first journey?
lore_bottom_sub: Log in with Discord and start tracking your gaming journeys.
settings_signin_hint: Sign in to manage your profile, preferences, and agent settings.
hero_anon_hint: Once you sign in, this is where your gaming journey lives — your profile, your stats, your story.
signin_prompt_sub: Join Yurnik with your Discord account to get started.
agent_failed: Failed to connect agent. Try again.
not_found_desc: This path doesn’t exist in Yurnik.
journeys_hint_pre: Automatically record your game journeys by
journeys_hint_post: . Journeys will appear here for you to confirm.
journeys_error: Something went wrong — please try again.
journeys_empty: No journeys yet. Add one to get started.
journeys_exclude_desc: Future journeys from this executable will be ignored.
hero_bio_placeholder: Tell people a bit about yourself…
realm_follow_hint: Follow some players to see their journeys here.
realm_activity_commented_own_you: You commented on your own {{game}} journey
profile_horizon_empty_you: Nothing on your horizon yet. Add games you intend to play from
journey_error: Something went wrong — please try again.
journey_slow_down_message: You're posting too fast — wait {{seconds}}s and try again.
journey_no_others: No one else on this journey yet.
horizon_subtitle: Games you're planning to play next. Drag to reorder — the top spot is what's coming up.
horizon_empty: This is the place for your future journeys.
settings_agent_desc: Automatically record your game journeys in the background.
settings_excluded_desc: These executables will never trigger a journey.
settings_hints_desc: Learned matches between executables and games. Remove a hint to let the agent re-detect from the window title.
settings_desktop_notifications_desc: Get notified when someone comments on your journeys or follows you.
settings_desktop_notifications_denied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
settings_delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and all of your data — journeys, comments, follows, and your horizon list. This cannot be undone.
settings_delete_account_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
legal_agree_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
terms_intro_body: Yurnik is an open social network for gaming journeys, operated as a small independent project. By creating an account or using the site, you agree to these terms.
terms_account_body: You sign in with Discord. Yurnik does not have its own passwords. Keep your Discord account secure — anyone with access to it can access your Yurnik account. You're responsible for activity under your account.
terms_content_body: Journey logs and comments are limited to 400 characters and are shown as plain text — no markdown or HTML, and no clickable links. Submissions containing a URL are rejected. Don't try to work around these limits.
terms_conduct_body: Use Yurnik to share your own gaming activity and engage with other players in good faith. Don't post spam, harassment, illegal content, or anything that misuses the platform. Automated or excessive submissions may be rate-limited or blocked.
terms_termination_body: We may suspend or remove an account that violates these terms. If your account has been suspended and you believe it was a mistake, you can reach us at contact@yurnik.example. You can also ask us to delete your account and associated data at any time by contacting us — see the Privacy Policy for how your data is handled.
terms_changes_body: These terms may be updated as the project evolves. We'll update the date at the top of this page when changes are made. Continued use of Yurnik after a change means you accept the updated terms.
terms_contact_body: Questions about these terms can be sent to privacy@yurnik.example.
privacy_intro_body: Yurnik is a small, independently operated, EU-based project. This page explains what information we collect, why, and how long we keep it.
privacy_data_body: When you sign in with Discord, we store your Discord user ID, username/handle, display name, and avatar image. You can replace the display name and avatar with your own within Yurnik — if you do, we store those instead. As you use Yurnik, we store the content you create — journey logs and comments — who you follow, and your Horizon list of games you plan to play next.
privacy_igdb_body: Yurnik caches game information from IGDB (titles, artwork, release info) to avoid repeated lookups. This cached game data is not personal data and isn't linked to you individually — it's shared reference data used to display game pages across the site.
privacy_why_body: Your Discord identity lets you sign in without a separate password. Your display name and avatar — Discord's or your own — are shown on your profile. Your journey logs, comments, follows, and Horizon list are the content of the site — they're shown to other players as part of how Yurnik works.
privacy_retention_body: Your data is kept for as long as your account exists. If you ask us to delete your account, your profile, journey logs, comments, and social graph data are removed. Some minimal records may be kept briefly where needed for security or to prevent abuse.
privacy_rights_body: If you're in the EU, you have rights under GDPR including access to your data, correction of inaccurate data, deletion, and data portability. To exercise any of these rights, contact us using the details below.
privacy_contact_body: For privacy questions or to make a request about your data, contact privacy@yurnik.example.
